Video.summary: A miner and an assayer try to short-circuit a mine owner's plans to corner the market.
Video.title: The Red Flannel Shirt

Video.summary: Gambler Brad Forrester meets a formidable opponent in schoolteacher Ruth Stewart.
Video.title: The Gambler and the Lady

Video.summary: A gunsmith and a crack shot duel.
Video.title: The Gunsmith

Video.summary: A captain tries to clear a trading post owner accused of selling ammunition to the enemy.
Video.title: A Bullet for the Captain

Video.summary: A phony newspaper item sparks a gold rush.
Video.title: Gold Lake

Video.summary: As their crops dry out, desperate farmers seek help from the owner of a hydraulic mining machine.
Video.title: The Talking Wire

Video.summary: Justin Gates must save a boy deathly ill after swallowing a concoction offered by a medicine man.
Video.title: Rx Slow Death

Video.summary: A drifter befriends a boy whose father has been jailed for horse theft.
Video.title: The Man on the Road

Video.summary: America's first female judge loses her life savings and her husband in a fight against corruption.
Video.title: A Woman's Rights

Video.summary: A singer wants to give up the fame and return home.
Video.title: Emma Is Coming

Video.summary: A former prospector is hired by a young woman to find her fiancé, who became lost in the mountains.
Video.title: Somewhere in the Vultures

Video.summary: A woman refuses to give her oxen to General Sam Houston for use in the war against Mexico.
Video.title: Pamela's Oxen

Video.summary: A widow's ranch is requisitioned by the Union Army, making her the target of Confederate cavalrymen.
Video.title: Splinter Station

Video.summary: A Union officer attempts to thwart Southern patriot Belle Waverly's schemes.
Video.title: The Yankee Confederate

Video.summary: A man seeking to open a saloon turns to Harry Bassett, Wyatt Earp and Bat Masterson for help.
Video.title: Extra Guns

Video.summary: A nun who tries to help an injured boy finds herself in trouble with the law.
Video.title: The Wind at Your Back

Video.summary: Yvonne DeCarlo plays a doctor struggling to begin a medical practice as a woman in the 1890s.
Video.title: The Lady Was an M.D.

Video.summary: A con artist boasts he owns most of San Francisco, but a chemist aims to expose him.
Video.title: The Stolen City

Video.summary: A female patriot meets an outlaw.
Video.title: General Without a Cause

Video.summary: A politician tries to ruin a senatorial candidate's chances by linking him with a dance hall girl.
Video.title: Quong Kee

Video.summary: A Navy officer mapping the Missouri River encounters a struggle between Indians and the Army.
Video.title: Sailor on a Horse

Video.summary: A doctor, ostracized after allowing a patient to die, gets a chance at redemption.
Video.title: The Scalpel and the Gun

Video.summary: A miner discovers a vein rich in ore near his claim after giving half of his stake to a singer.
Video.title: Ten Feet of Nothing

Video.summary: A vagabond finds stolen riches and becomes a philanthropist.
Video.title: Money to Burn

Video.summary: In the years after California's conquest, an Army commander grapples with hostile citizens.
Video.title: Goodbye Five Hundred Pesos

Video.summary: A newspaperman receives permission to accompany Gen. Custer's troops as they go to war with Sioux.
Video.title: The Great Lounsberry Scoop

Video.summary: An ex-con tries to prevent the son he gave up for adoption from following in his steps.
Video.title: The Young Gun

Video.summary: A merchant looking to make more money fabricates reports of snowfall cutting off local supply lines.
Video.title: White Gold

Video.summary: The story of Sacajawea, the Native woman who helped explorers Lewis and Clark.
Video.title: The Girl Who Walked the West

Image.alt: The Girl Who Walked the West
The Girl Who Walked the West
The Girl Who Walked the West
The Girl Who Walked the West
The Girl Who Walked the West
The Girl Who Walked the West
The Girl Who Walked the West
The Girl Who Walked the West
The Girl Who Walked the West

Video.summary: A tomboy changes her ways when she meets the handsome constable of a mining town.
Video.title: The Indiana Girl

Video.summary: Two Americans on their way to Santa Fe are captured by Mexican troops and held prisoner.
Video.title: Bread on the Desert

Video.summary: John Slaughter's deputy poses a problem: the maverick is prone to violence and accepting bribes.
Video.title: A Shortcut Through Tombstone

Video.summary: Renegade Natives led by a white man named Clay threaten the residents of a decommissioned fort.
Video.title: Long Night at Fort Lonely

Video.summary: Mormons must save the life of a dying man or face the wrath of his tribe.
Video.title: A Key for the Fort

Video.summary: A trouble-shooter must establish a mail route in bandit country.
Video.title: The King of Uvalde Road

Video.summary: A young man hunts for gold, hoping to impress his girl so she'll accept his proposal.
Video.title: The Mezcla Man

Video.summary: Maso and Okei, tea growers in Gold Hills, encounter both friendship and racism from the locals.
Video.title: The Dragon of Gold Hill

Video.summary: Inspector Wesley Hull is determined to discover how postmaster Jack Reardon can sell so many stamps.
Video.title: The Biggest Little Post Office in the World

Image.alt: The Biggest Little Post Office in the World
The Biggest Little Post Office in the World
The Biggest Little Post Office in the World
The Biggest Little Post Office in the World
The Biggest Little Post Office in the World
The Biggest Little Post Office in the World
The Biggest Little Post Office in the World
The Biggest Little Post Office in the World
The Biggest Little Post Office in the World

Video.summary: A loveless woman baker decides to leave, causing her town to lose its only pie supplier.
Video.title: The Solid Gold Pie

Video.summary: A gambler is determined to collect his poker winnings: half of Tombstone, Arizona.
Video.title: The Duke of Tombstone

Video.summary: Count Peter intends to wed a don's daughter, but a misunderstanding lands him in hot water.
Video.title: Count Me In, Count Me Out

Image.alt: Count Me In, Count Me Out
Count Me In, Count Me Out
Count Me In, Count Me Out
Count Me In, Count Me Out
Count Me In, Count Me Out
Count Me In, Count Me Out
Count Me In, Count Me Out
Count Me In, Count Me Out
Count Me In, Count Me Out

Video.summary: Red Eagle and Little Fawn fight an unscrupulous businessman to secure an army freight contract.
Video.title: The Contract
